function_v0.doc:
Register an asset. Pricing comes from the per-asset oracle (if set via
`set_asset_oracle`) or the global primary/fallback oracles.

# Errors
* [`AssetHandlerError::NotAdmin`]
* [`AssetHandlerError::AssetAlreadyRegistered`]
function_v0.name: add_asset

function_v0.doc:
Return the `PRICE_PRECISION`-scaled price of `asset`.

Resolution: per-asset oracle \xe2\x86\x92 primary (Reflector) \xe2\x86\x92 fallback (DIA).

# Errors
* [`AssetHandlerError::AssetNotRegistered`]
* [`AssetHandlerError::NoPrimaryOracle`] \xe2\x80\x94 primary not configured and no per-asset oracle
* [`AssetHandlerError::PriceNotAvailable`] \xe2\x80\x94 all oracles failed or returned 0
function_v0.name: get_price

function_v0.doc:
Batch price lookup \xe2\x80\x94 returns a `Map<asset, price>` for every requested asset.

Each asset goes through the same three-tier resolution as `get_price`.
Panics if any asset is unregistered or has no available price.
function_v0.name: get_prices

function_v0.doc:
Remove an asset from the registry. Also clears its per-asset oracle if set.

# Errors
* [`AssetHandlerError::NotAdmin`]
* [`AssetHandlerError::AssetNotRegistered`]
function_v0.name: remove_asset

function_v0.doc: Return the per-asset oracle address, or `None` if not set.
function_v0.name: get_asset_oracle

function_v0.doc:
Assign a dedicated oracle to `asset`.

The oracle contract must implement `get_price(asset: Address) -> i128`.
Use this for assets not covered by the global oracles or that need a
specialised price feed.

# Errors
* [`AssetHandlerError::NotAdmin`]
* [`AssetHandlerError::AssetNotRegistered`]
function_v0.name: set_asset_oracle

function_v0.doc: Set the primary global oracle (e.g. a Reflector adapter).\nMust implement `get_price(asset: Address) -> i128`.
function_v0.name: set_primary_oracle

function_v0.doc:
Remove the per-asset oracle for `asset` so it falls back to global oracles.

# Errors
* [`AssetHandlerError::NotAdmin`]
function_v0.name: remove_asset_oracle

function_v0.doc: Set the fallback global oracle (e.g. a DIA adapter).\nUsed when the primary oracle reverts or returns 0.
function_v0.name: set_fallback_oracle

void_v0.doc: Protocol admin (persistent \xe2\x80\x94 survives instance TTL expiry).
void_v0.name: Admin

void_v0.doc: Ordered list of all registered asset addresses.
void_v0.name: RegisteredAssets

tuple_v0.doc: Optional per-asset oracle. When set, takes priority over the global\nprimary/fallback oracles. Must implement `get_price(asset) -> i128`.
tuple_v0.name: AssetOracle

void_v0.doc: Primary global oracle (e.g. Reflector adapter).\nUsed for all assets that have no per-asset oracle.
void_v0.name: PrimaryOracle

void_v0.doc: Fallback global oracle (e.g. DIA adapter).\nUsed when the primary oracle reverts or returns 0.
void_v0.name: FallbackOracle
